items.title: COXFA4L2 upregulation preserves residual cytochrome c oxidase activity in COXFA4-related Leigh-like encephalopathy
items.desc: Falabella et al. report the largest cohort of individuals with biallelic COXFA4 variants associated with Leigh-like encephalopathy and show that the paralog COXFA4L2 partially compensates for complex IV deficiency, suggesting a potential therapeutic strategy.
